Sprites13_Pokemon2_15 byte {
}$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$01,$01,$01,$01,$01,$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,{
}$00,$00,$00,$00,$01,$01,$01,$0d,$0d,$0d,$0d,$01,$01,$00,$00,$00,{
}$00,$00,$01,$01,$0d,$0d,$0d,$0e,$0e,$0e,$0e,$0d,$0d,$01,$00,$00,{
}$00,$01,$0f,$0d,$0e,$0d,$0e,$0e,$10,$0e,$0e,$0d,$0e,$0d,$01,$00,{
}$01,$0f,$0d,$0e,$10,$0d,$0e,$10,$10,$0e,$0d,$0d,$0d,$0e,$01,$00,{
}$01,$0f,$0d,$10,$0e,$0e,$0d,$0d,$0d,$0d,$0e,$0e,$0e,$0d,$05,$01,{
}$01,$05,$0d,$0e,$0e,$0d,$0e,$10,$10,$0d,$0e,$10,$0e,$0d,$05,$01,{
}$01,$05,$0d,$0e,$0d,$0e,$10,$10,$0e,$0e,$0d,$10,$0e,$0d,$05,$01,{
}$00,$01,$05,$0d,$0d,$0e,$10,$0e,$0e,$0e,$0d,$0e,$0e,$0d,$05,$01,{
}$00,$01,$05,$0d,$0d,$0e,$0e,$0e,$0d,$0d,$0d,$0d,$0d,$05,$01,$00,{
}$00,$01,$01,$05,$05,$0d,$0d,$0d,$05,$05,$05,$05,$05,$01,$01,$00,{
}$00,$00,$01,$11,$11,$05,$05,$05,$01,$01,$01,$11,$11,$12,$01,$00,{

}$00,$00,$00,$00,$00,$01,$01,$01,$01,$01,$01,$01,$00,$00,$00,$00

'Sprites13_Pokemon2 Colors
Sprites13_Pokemon2Colors long {
}%00000000_00000000_00000000_00000000,{   'index=0x0
}%11111111_00000000_00000000_00000000,{   'index=0x1
}%11111111_10011000_00000000_00000000,{   'index=0x2
}%11111111_11010000_00111000_00000000,{   'index=0x3
}%11111111_11111000_10000000_01011000,{   'index=0x4
}%11111111_11111000_11111000_11111000,{   'index=0x5
}%11111111_11111000_11110000_00000000,{   'index=0x6
}%11111111_00110000_00111000_10001000,{   'index=0x7
}%11111111_10100000_01101000_00000000,{   'index=0x8
}%11111111_11011000_10110000_00000000,{   'index=0x9
}%11111111_10111000_11001000_11110000,{   'index=0xa
}%11111111_11110000_11110000_11110000,{   'index=0xb
}%11111111_11110000_11110000_10000000,{   'index=0xc
}%11111111_01110000_00111000_00000000,{   'index=0xd
}%11111111_11011000_01110000_00011000,{   'index=0xe
}%11111111_10110000_10111000_11000000,{   'index=0xf
}%11111111_11111000_10010000_01000000,{   'index=0x10
}%11111111_10101000_01100000_00011000,{   'index=0x11
}%11111111_11011000_10101000_01100000   'index=0x12
